nasb.text: then you are to say to them, ‘I was presenting my petition before the king, not to make me return to the house of Jonathan to die there.’ ”

esv.text: then you shall say to them, ‘I made a humble plea to the king that he would not send me back to the house of Jonathan to die there.’”

cnv.text: 你就要對他們說：‘我只是把我的懇求呈到王面前，求他不要把我送回約拿單的房子去，免得我死在那裡。’”

ccb.text: 你可以告诉他们，你是在求我不要把你押回约拿单的房子，以免死在那里。”
